# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: http-gateway
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      istio: ingressgateway # use istio default controller
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: http-gateway
  namespace: "istio-system"
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*" # match all hosts to this gateway instance (the ingress gateway is single host)
  gateways: ["http-gateway"] # the gateway we created earlier. I want this gateway to route HTTP traffic from any host. This way, all the ingress requests will be directed at Istio’s ingress gateway.
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: "/"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: some-service # this is my service that I’m routing to with Istio (for example, this is where you will put a real microservice’s URL)
